name: codenomous
description: Self-learning skill maintenance layer for Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: Learn reusable Codex skills from project sessions.
interface.longDescription: Codenomous packages adaptive project skills and a deterministic local harness for syncing Codex history, staging learning intents, promoting self-authored skills, and pruning unused learned skills.
interface.defaultPrompt: Sync recent project learning with Codenomous.
